---
title: "Elizabeth (Liz) Peterson"
image: RJH06643.JPG
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elizabeth-peterson-85046b204/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/egp4aq
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:elizabethpeterson@bren.ucsb.edu
---

Hi, I’m Liz Peterson, a recent graduate of the Environmental Data Science master’s program at UC Santa Barbara's Bren School of Environmnetal Science and Management, where I focused on using data to address climate change through an equity-driven lens. I now work at an Impact Investment firm in San Francisco, working to direct private capital towards companies and funds working to solve environmental and social problems.

I’m passionate about climate justice, conservation, and policy, especially when they intersect with real communities and real solutions. 

Take a look at my [About page](about.qmd) to learn more, or head over to the [Blog](posts.qmd) to see what I’ve been thinking about lately.
